title: Pathology Laboratory Techniques Program Educational Objectives
content:
Pathology Laboratory Techniques Program Educational Objectives

1-To train professionals who are competent in radiotherapy applications, adhere to ethical values, follow scientific developments, and utilize contemporary technologies to provide qualified health services.

2-To ensure our graduates prioritize patient safety and human rights in healthcare delivery and actively participate in multidisciplinary work environments.

3-To educate technicians who act with a consciousness of lifelong learning and professional development, remain open to innovations in the health field, and adapt to labor market demands.

4-To produce graduates who are sensitive to public health, aware of environmental and social issues, make decisions based on ethical principles, and feel responsible towards society.
